title: Bitcoin will get ‘lift’ from Hyperliquid, Robinhood in next crypto bull market: Bitwise exec
summary: Bitcoin will get ‘lift’ from Hyperliquid, Robinhood in next crypto bull market: Bitwise exec
briefing: Bitwise predicted that Hyperliquid and Robinhood TradFi ventures should form the basis for a crypto bull-market comeback that would lift Bitcoin and Ether.

title: Coinbase to expand Singapore office headcount by 25%: report
summary: Coinbase to expand Singapore office headcount by 25%: report
briefing: Coinbase plans to expand its Singapore office from 150 to about 200 employees by the end of 2026 as it grows its presence in the Lion City.

title: Bitcoin may have bottomed before its traditional cycle low: Grayscale’s Pandl
summary: Bitcoin may have bottomed before its traditional cycle low: Grayscale’s Pandl
briefing: Grayscale’s head of research said that Bitcoin may have bottomed, arguing that macro factors, such as interest rate decisions as increasingly driving the price action of this maturing asset class.

title: Home invasions became most common crypto wrench attack in H1 2026: CertiK
summary: Home invasions became most common crypto wrench attack in H1 2026: CertiK
briefing: Crypto home invasions rose to 20 in H1 2026 from one a year earlier, while France accounted for 33 of 52 verified wrench attacks, according to CertiK.

title: BitMEX to shut down after 11 years in crypto derivatives
summary: BitMEX to shut down after 11 years in crypto derivatives
briefing: BitMEX announced it will shut down operations on Sept. 23, 2026, after owner HDR Global Trading Limited decided to close the crypto exchange.

title: Mirae Asset completes Korbit acquisition, becomes largest shareholder
summary: Mirae Asset completes Korbit acquisition, becomes largest shareholder
briefing: Mirae Asset Consulting has become Korbit’s largest shareholder after completing its acquisition, with the exchange saying trading and customer asset protections are unchanged.

title: Bitcoin ETFs approach $1B in 7-session inflow run
summary: Bitcoin ETFs approach $1B in 7-session inflow run
briefing: US spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $69 million in inflows on Wednesday, extending their inflow streak to seven sessions and bringing total inflows during the period to nearly $1 billion

title: Kakao taps Circle to explore won stablecoin payment infrastructure
summary: Kakao taps Circle to explore won stablecoin payment infrastructure
briefing: Kakao Group and Circle signed an MOU to explore won stablecoin payments, remittances, merchant settlement and tokenized financial services.

title: Arbitrum Perp DEX AFX Trade Drained of $24M, Offers Hacker 30% to Return It
summary: Arbitrum Perp DEX AFX Trade Drained of $24M, Offers Hacker 30% to Return It
briefing: The exploit hit a custody bridge AFX operates rather than the Arbitrum network itself, with the stolen funds quickly moved to Ethereum.

title: BitMEX to Close on September 23, Halts New Sign-Ups
summary: BitMEX to Close on September 23, Halts New Sign-Ups
briefing: The crypto derivatives pioneer told users to close positions and withdraw funds before it goes dark on September 23.

title: Coinbase Wants to Be Canada's One-Stop Shop for Stocks, Crypto and Prediction Markets
summary: Coinbase Wants to Be Canada's One-Stop Shop for Stocks, Crypto and Prediction Markets
briefing: The company's "Everything Exchange" is heading north. No launch date set yet, but the Coinbase Canada CEO says phase two for the company is in motion.

title: Kraken Parent Company Makes Moves to Offer xStocks From Global Markets
summary: Kraken Parent Company Makes Moves to Offer xStocks From Global Markets
briefing: Payward and fintech GTN are teaming up to bring xStocks—blockchain-based copies of real company shares—to Hong Kong, the UK, Europe, and South Korea.

title: Alibaba's New Qwen Image 3 AI Wants to Be Useful, Not Just Pretty
summary: Alibaba's New Qwen Image 3 AI Wants to Be Useful, Not Just Pretty
briefing: Qwen Image 3.0 generates dense newspapers and infographic grids in one shot and renders text down to 10 pixels. The catch: no benchmarks, no open weights.

title: Franklin Templeton Says Agentic AI Is Crypto's 'Killer Use Case'
summary: Franklin Templeton Says Agentic AI Is Crypto's 'Killer Use Case'
briefing: The asset manager argues that AI software capable of paying for things autonomously will need blockchain rails to work—and that most investors aren't positioned for it.

title: Bitcoin Is Bouncing: Here’s the Bull and Bear Case for Its Next Move
summary: Bitcoin Is Bouncing: Here’s the Bull and Bear Case for Its Next Move
briefing: The good news: Bitcoin is holding onto key support, and rising. The bad news: a "death cross" is still active, and prediction markets are still overwhelmingly bearish.

title: Clarity Act Latest Draft Bars Trump From Crypto Ventures—But Only Until 2029
summary: Clarity Act Latest Draft Bars Trump From Crypto Ventures—But Only Until 2029
briefing: The long-awaited market-structure bill would block officials and their spouses from issuing digital assets and shield non-custodial developers, but the ethics ban expires in 2029 and enforcement rests solely with the DOJ.
